title: Proclamation No. 257, s. 1938
text:
PROCLAMATION NO. 257

RESERVING FOR SCHOOL PURPOSES THREE PARCELS OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE BARRIO OF BADIODAYA, MUNICIPALITY OF PINLI, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS NORTE, ISLAND OF LUZON.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce and pursuant to the provisions of section eighty-three of Commonwealth Act Numbered One hundred and forty-one, I hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for school purposes, under the administration of the Director of Education, subject to private rights, if any there be, the following-described parcels of the public domain, situated in the barrio of Badiodaya, municipality of Pinili, Province of Ilocos Norte, Island of Luzon, and particularly described in Bureau of Lands plan Swo-15177, to wit:

Lot No. 1 ( surveyed by S.A. Markham).—Beginning at point marked “1” on Bureau of Lands plan Swo-15177, N. 42° 34’ E. 99.77 m. from cement well of Mariano Coloma, thence S. 66° 03’ E. 49.94 m. to point 2; 23° 18’ W. 34.44 m. to point 3; N. 66° 14’ W. 49.99 m. to point 4; N. 23° 23’ E. 34.59 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 1,724 square meters.

All corners are stone monuments.

Bounded on the northeast, by lot No. 3 of plan Swo-15177 (lot No. 6, II-6429); on the southeast, by calle (no name); on the southwest, by lot No. 2 of plan Swo-15177 (lot No. 5, II-6429); and on the northwest, by Calle San Cirilo.

Bearings true. Declination, 0° 13’ E.

Points referred to are marked on Bureau of Lands plan Swo-15177, sheet No. 1.

Surveyed: April 17, 1909.

Approved: October 29, 1937.

NOTE—Lot No, 1 is identical with lot No. 5, II-1028-C as surveyed for the municipality of Badoc.

This survey is situated in the former barrio of Pinili, municipality of Badoc.

Lot No. 2 (surveyed by C.F. Merten).—Beginning at point marked “1” on Bureau of Lands plan Swo-15177, which is identical with B.L.B.M. No. 2, barrio of Badiodaya, municipality of Pinili, thence S. 64° 04’ E. 52.45 m. to point 2; N. 19° 41’ E. 31.26 m. to point 3; N. 66° 14’ W. 49.99 m. to point 4; S. 24° 09’ W. 29.20 m.to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 1,545 square meters.

Points 2 and 3, stones; point 4, stone monument.

Bounded on the northeast, by lot No. 5 of plan II-1028-C; on the southeast and southwest, by calle (no name); and on the northwest, by Calle San Cirilo.

Lot No. 3. (surveyed by C.F. Merten).—Beginning at a point marked “1” on Bureau of Lands plan Swo-15177, which is identical with B.L.B.M. No. 1, barrio of Badiodaya, municipality of Pinili, thence S. 64° 04’ E. 52.45 m. to point 2; S. 28° 11’ W. 44.54 m. to point 3; N. 66° 03’ W. 49.94 m.to point 4; N. 24° 57’ E. 46.25 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 2,322 square meters.

Points 2 and 3, stones; point 4, stone monument.

Bounded on the northeast and southeast, by calle (no name); on the southwest, by lot No. 5 of plan II-1028-C; and on the northwest, by Calle San Cirilo.

Bearing true. Declination, 0° 01’ E.

Points referred to are marked on Bureau of Lands plan Swo-15177, sheet No. 2.

Surveyed: March 15, 1912.

Approved: October 29, 1937.

NOTE—Lot No. 2 is identical with lot No. 5, II-6429 as surveyed for the municipal government of Badoc.

Lot No. 3 is identical with lot No. 6, II-6429 as surveyed for the municipal government of Badoc.

This survey is situated in the former sitio of Pinili, barrio of Badiodaya, municipality of Badoc.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this eleventh day of February, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and thirty-eight, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the third.

{SEAL}

President of the Philippines

By the President:

Secretary to the President
